nodes.name: ewc.rs
nodes.summary: Elastic weight consolidation regularizer — computes Fisher information and applies penalty to slow catastrophic forgetting.

nodes.name: dataset.rs
nodes.summary: Dataset assembler that materializes accumulated trajectories into export-ready training samples.

nodes.name: huggingface_hub.rs
nodes.summary: Hugging Face Hub uploader — pushes exported model/dataset artifacts via hf_hub client.

nodes.name: mod.rs
nodes.summary: Export submodule root — re-exports dataset, pretrain, safetensors, and HF-hub interfaces.

nodes.name: pretrain.rs
nodes.summary: Pretrain export pipeline — converts continual-learning state into a base-model-compatible checkpoint.

nodes.name: safetensors.rs
nodes.summary: Safetensors serialization adapter for export of model weights and adapter deltas.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Crate root for sona — declares modules and re-exports the public continual-learning API surface.

nodes.name: background.rs
nodes.summary: Background consolidation loop — periodically replays buffered trajectories with EWC regularization.

nodes.name: coordinator.rs
nodes.summary: Loop coordinator — schedules instant vs background loops and brokers shared state via a mailbox.

nodes.name: instant.rs
nodes.summary: Instant inference loop — processes incoming trajectories with low-latency LoRA adapters.

nodes.name: mod.rs
nodes.summary: Loops submodule root — re-exports coordinator, background, and instant loop drivers.

nodes.name: lora.rs
nodes.summary: LoRA (low-rank adaptation) adapter store — manages adapter ranks, application, and merge operations.

nodes.name: mod.rs
nodes.summary: Stray mod.rs placeholder under src/ — typically empty or a re-export shim.

nodes.name: napi.rs
nodes.summary: Full N-API bindings exposing the sona engine to Node.js consumers.

nodes.name: napi_simple.rs
nodes.summary: Simplified N-API surface — minimal bindings for embedded/lightweight Node deployments.

nodes.name: reasoning_bank.rs
nodes.summary: Reasoning-bank vault — stores extracted reasoning traces keyed by trajectory ID for replay.

nodes.name: time_compat.rs
nodes.summary: Time-API shim providing wasm/native compatible Instant and Duration helpers.

nodes.name: factory.rs
nodes.summary: Training pipeline factory — constructs pipelines parameterized by template/config.

nodes.name: federated.rs
nodes.summary: Federated-training driver — aggregates gradients/updates across distributed sona nodes.

nodes.name: metrics.rs
nodes.summary: Training-metrics collectors — loss, gradient norms, EWC penalty, throughput counters.

nodes.name: mod.rs
nodes.summary: Training submodule root — re-exports factory, federated, metrics, pipeline, templates.

nodes.name: pipeline.rs
nodes.summary: Core training pipeline — drives batched forward/backward passes with optional EWC and LoRA stages.
